2026-06-26 18:06:45.394 [Information] Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command: Executed DbCommand (31ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Name], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [c].[Id] = [p].[CategoryId] AND [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AS [ProductCount]

    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[IsDeleted], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[OrderStatus], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[UserId], [u].[Id] AS [Id0], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [u].[KycStatus], [u].[LastName], [u].[OtpCode], [u].[OtpExpiry], [u].[OtpVerified], [u].[Password], [u].[Phone], [u].[Status], [u].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [o].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CreatedAt], [o0].[IsDeleted], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Price], [o0].[ProductId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[UpdatedAt], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[BuyPrice], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p].[MetalType], [p].[Name], [p].[Purity], [p].[SellPrice], [p].[Status], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [p].[Weight]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o0]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s0].[Id]

2026-06-29 14:11:13.575 [Information] Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command: Executed DbCommand (23ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int64)], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[IsDeleted], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[OrderStatus], [o].[PaymentStatus], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt], [o].[UserId], [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[KycStatus], [u].[LastName], [u].[OtpCode], [u].[OtpExpiry], [u].[OtpVerified], [u].[Password], [u].[Phone], [u].[Status], [u].[UpdatedAt], [s].[Id], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[OrderId], [s].[Price], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[Id0], [s].[BuyPrice], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[ImageUrl], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[MetalType], [s].[Name], [s].[Purity], [s].[SellPrice], [s].[Status], [s].[Stock], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [s].[Weight]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CreatedAt], [o0].[IsDeleted], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[Price], [o0].[ProductId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[UpdatedAt], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[BuyPrice], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p].[MetalType], [p].[Name], [p].[Purity], [p].[SellPrice], [p].[Status], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [p].[Weight]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o0]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [o].[Id] = [s].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [o].[UserId] = @userId
ORDER BY [o].[Id], [u].[Id], [s].[Id]

SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UserId], [s].[Id], [s].[CartId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[Id0], [s].[BuyPrice], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[ImageUrl], [s].[IsDeleted0], [s].[MetalType], [s].[Name], [s].[Purity], [s].[SellPrice], [s].[Status], [s].[Stock], [s].[UpdatedAt0], [s].[Weight]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UserId]
    FROM [Carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[UserId] = @userId AND [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[CartId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[ProductId], [c0].[Quantity], [c0].[UnitPrice], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[BuyPrice], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p].[MetalType], [p].[Name], [p].[Purity], [p].[SellPrice], [p].[Status], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [p].[Weight]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [c0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [c1].[Id] = [s].[CartId]
ORDER BY [c1].[Id], [s].[Id]

    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[CartId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[ProductId], [c0].[Quantity], [c0].[UnitPrice], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[BuyPrice], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p].[MetalType], [p].[Name], [p].[Purity], [p].[SellPrice], [p].[Status], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [p].[Weight]
    FROM [CartItems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [c0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [c1].[Id] = [s].[CartId]
ORDER BY [c1].[Id], [s].[Id]
